nonBlockingFindings: Force-password-change-on-first-login NOT enforced (no schema migration this phase) — operational known-gap SEED-2: temp password delivered out-of-band, admin resets via UI.

Customer SQL Server compatibility level unconfirmed — carried program-wide, not auth-specific.
